roa.docketEntryComment: RPTR LAURIE WARNER, PITCHESS IN CAMERA HRG
PD MOT FOR ORDR TO PROD DOCU FOR INSPE PURS TO EC1043 FILED TODAY

/X:32 PC, MISDEMEANOR, IS LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF 11378 HS IN COUNT 1,//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:01/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ64D/CTS:64/WS/RX/SECFEE/VF1/OBEY/ACCEP/
